metadata.description: TsRun toolkit: dev workflow skills and MCP integrations for Claude Code, split into focused plugins.

plugins.name: tsrun-dev
plugins.description: Code dev skills: fix-types and doc.

plugins.name: tsrun-web
plugins.description: Website cloning skill with parallel builder agents (requires Playwright MCP).

plugins.name: tsrun-housekeeping
plugins.description: Session cleanup skill + Stop hooks (sound + autocommit-session pruning).
